message:
Add fixture-based identity extraction tests

- Create testdata/ directory with Claude, Codex, and Gemini credential fixtures
- Add fixture tests for Claude: current format (no email/accountId), legacy with email,
  minimal, no oauth section, epoch seconds format, and invalid JSON
- Add fixture tests for Codex: with email JWT, nested tokens, and no tokens
- Add fixture tests for Gemini: with email, nested account, nested user, and no email
- Tests validate identity extraction handles all format variations correctly

caam-ebu3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
